content.text:
Here are the **latest English posts** on X (as of Feb 5, 2026) matching your query for React Native, React Native AI, Shadcn UI, Shadcn, or TanStack. (Note: Recent hits were predominantly React Native-focused dev discussions, tools, and libraries—no direct Shadcn or TanStack mentions in the top results.) I've pulled the most relevant ones:[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019189981932040681)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019189615547056530)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2019188744838873112)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2019181992365937092)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2019173908042383789)

### Key Highlights:
- **React Native vs. Native Debate**: Ongoing threads compare React Native/Expo to Swift/SwiftUI for cross-platform apps, citing better DX (dev experience), hot reload, and fewer Xcode bugs, though native devs prefer familiarity.[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2019191055598645367)[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019189981932040681)
- **Freelance & Stacks**: Full-stack devs offering React Native + backend (Spring Boot/Django/Nest.js) services at ~$45/hr. Common stacks: Expo/React Native frontend, Postgres DB, TypeScript.[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019189615547056530)[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2019188453997461855)
- **Push Notifications**: React Native + Expo users seeking recs for iOS/Android (Expo Push, FCM, OneSignal) with Java backend orchestration.[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2019188744838873112)
- **Performance & Libraries**:
  - Huge boost announced for `react-native-quick-base64` library.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2019181992365937092)
  - v1 of `react-native-keyboard-composer` released for ChatGPT-style chats: smooth keyboard animations, auto-growing input, pin-to-top streaming, scroll-to-bottom button. Open source, cross-platform.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2019173908042383789)
- **CI/CD Workflows**: Devs building React Native iOS/Android pipelines, troubleshooting certs.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2019181259918901540)

For more context, full threads, images/videos, or Top-ranked posts, let me know! 🚀
